case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. VS. EDWARD NOVAK et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-26-2011 CONTINUED TO DEC-19-2011 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE OCT-26-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NOVAK, EDWARD $8,348.08 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $3,051.39 INTEREST, $269.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,468.97, SEE SCANNED DOC
